overall.description: A first-person walk along a sunny coastal beach in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The camera moves steadily past a modern resort building perched on sand dunes before continuing along the open shoreline with a distant coastal town visible across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with coastal resort building on dunes

events.description: camera walks past the coastal resort building which begins to exit the frame left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach toward a large beige resort building perched on sand dunes

entered.detail: multi-story beige resort building with balconies situated on elevated sand dunes
grassy sand dunes supporting the coastal building
wide expanse of light tan sand forming the beach surface
calm blue ocean water meeting the shoreline
urban settlement visible across the water on the opposite shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny beach with a large coastal resort building visible ahead on the left, perched atop sand dunes. The camera walks steadily forward along the sand, approaching the building as the ocean stretches out to the right. The distant coastline with buildings is visible across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with panoramic ocean view

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the empty beach with the ocean to the right and distant town ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the resort building, the camera continues along the wide open beach. The view opens up to show the expansive ocean on the right and the distant coastal town across the water. The beach remains empty and the walk continues in a straight line along the shoreline with consistent bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a bright, sunny beach that transitions from a structured resort area to an expansive, open shoreline. It begins with the camera walking steadily toward a large coastal resort building perched atop sand dunes to the left, while the calm ocean stretches out to the right. As the camera passes the building, the perspective opens up to reveal a wider expanse of empty sand and the shimmering water. The scene then shifts into a straight, uninterrupted walk along the shoreline, with the distant coastal town becoming more prominent across the horizon under consistent, bright sunlight.
